title: BLUELIGHT: Kill Chain Timeline
description: Time histogram of BLUELIGHT-related events grouped by process. The malware binary, browser children, and PowerShell loaders each show a distinct cadence in the line chart, exposing campaign rhythm.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Sysmon Network Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and ('Process Name' like '%bluelight.exe' or 'Source Process' like '%bluelight.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '%iexplore.exe' or 'Destination Hostname' like '%graph.microsoft.com%' or 'Destination Hostname' like '%mail.google.com%' or 'Destination Hostname' like '%jquery.services%' or 'Granted Access' = '0x1fffff' or 'Target Filename' like '%bluelight.pdb%' or 'Target Filename' like '%cheV01%' or 'Target Filename' like '%INTEG.RAW%' or 'Command Line' like '%FromBase64String%' or 'Command Line' like '%cookie_name: OSID%' or 'Command Line' like '%ipinfo.io%' or 'Command Line' like '%Win32_%') | timestats span = 1hour count as Events by 'Process Name'

ask_ai_prompts: Which process drives the most BLUELIGHT activity?
When did credential-theft activity peak in the last 24 hours?
